description: Revolution Brought On by Plot of the Dark Forces for Separi NATION BETRAYED 10 SAVE AUTOCRACY PEOPLE BELIEVE Convinced Rulers Deliberately Permitted Dis asters to Armies Exhaustion of Finance De moralization of the Railroad and Supply Sys tems and Starvation of the Civil Population By Philip Francis Twelve years ago this coming Sep tember the Russian liberals won a bloodless revolution by the simple and powerful expedient of a uni versal strike The wheels of every industry in Russia stopped for thirty days and then the frightened Czar capitulated and promised constitutional govern ment Two years later his pledges were practically all violated and the Duma shorn of its authority while it was cynically announced that the Czar who granted a constitution had the right to annul It whenever it seemed good to him REVOLT CAUSED BY BELIEF OF TREACHERY The revolution of 1905 was brought atbout by the disasters and humilia tions of the Japanese war and popu lar belief in official corruption and treachery In exactly the same way on a far greater scale the revolution of 1917 has been brought about by the dis asters and humiliations of this war and popular belief in the treachery and
